title: citharexylum spinosum f. villosum
intro: Citharexylum spinosum f. villosum, also known as the hairy mountain-sage, is a plant species belonging to the Verbenaceae family. It is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Citharexylum spinosum f. villosum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis.
